heroHeadline: KMT Chair Cheng Li-wun Arrives in Shanghai — 'Journey for Peace' Begins; PLA 1 Sortie + 8 PLAN Vessels April 7
heroSubtitle: Cheng Li-wun lands in Shanghai at noon Apr 7 (Apr 7-12: Shanghai → Nanjing → Beijing); Xi Jinping meeting expected; first KMT chair China visit in ~10 years; PLA keeps 1 sortie + 8 naval vessels in multi-vector posture on KMT arrival day — combined pressure-and-dialogue signal; April running total 205 aircraft tracks, 294 ship tracks; YTD sorties −46.5% vs 2025; 37 days to Trump-Xi Beijing summit (May 14-15); Taiwan defense budget stalemate continues
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, AIT, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, Nikkei Asia, Japan Times, ANI News, Vision Times, South China Morning Post, Taiwan News, Asia Times, The Asia Cable, GlobalSecurity.org, Xinhua, CGTN, The Diplomat, Washington Times, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
